title: Basic JavaScript JSON
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript JSON. Focus on implementing JSON.parse correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript JSON
description: Create a function that uses JSON.parse and JSON.stringify together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript JSON Project
description: Build a small application that applies JSON.parse, JSON.stringify, Reviver parameter in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

description: The following code has bugs related to JSON.parse. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript JSON
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with JSON.parse and JSON.stringify.
